title: SmokeQuinovy
description: A savory, velvety Saudi Arabian dish featuring quinoa, infused with smoke to aid in hangover recovery.

ingredients.name: Tomato Paste
ingredients.notes: Promotes hangover recovery and adds flavor

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for best smoke infusion

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Enhances the flavors of this dish and is also known to aid in hangover recovery

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: For a velvety texture and additional richness

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: For added depth of flavor and optional for garnish

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: To balance the savory flavors with a touch of sweetness, aiding in hangover recovery

instructions: Combine quinoa, tomato paste, garlic, onion, lemon juice, and butter in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until fragrant.
Fold in cooked quinoa, adding it slowly to ensure no lumps form and the dish comes together evenly.
Add sesame seeds for garnish if desired. Mix well to distribute.
Stir honey into the mixture to balance flavors and aid hangover recovery. Adjust amount as needed based on personal taste preferences.
